name: Beef & Salsa Burritos
recipeIngredient: 10-oz. frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, brown the ground beef over medium heat for 10 to 12 minutes or until no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
2. Pour off any drippings.
3. Season the beef with chili powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir in the spinach and salsa, then heat through.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the cheese.
6. Spoon 1/2 cup of beef mixture into the center of each tortilla.
7. Fold the bottom edge up over the filling.
8. Fold the sides to the center, overlapping edges.
9. Makes 8 burritos.
